findings.issue: Subprocess command uses shell=False but could be vulnerable to command injection if user input is passed
findings.suggestion: Validate all inputs before passing to subprocess.run(). Consider using shlex.quote() for any dynamic arguments.

findings.issue: Git credentials might be exposed in logs when commands fail
findings.suggestion: Sanitize error messages before logging. Remove or redact sensitive information from subprocess error output.

findings.issue: Function rank_by_priority has cyclomatic complexity > 10 (KISS violation)
findings.suggestion: Extract sorting logic into separate helper function. Split into find_by_severity() and sort_by_confidence().
Extract format_severity_badge() helper function to reduce duplication across PR generation.

findings.issue: Missing type hints for return value
findings.suggestion: Add return type hint -> List[Dict[str, Any]]

findings.issue: Multiple git log calls in loop - O(n) subprocess overhead
findings.suggestion: Batch git log queries using --name-only and parse output once. Use git log --format='%ci' --all to get all timestamps in single call.

findings.issue: Sorting findings twice (once for grouping, once for ranking) - unnecessary O(n log n) operation
findings.suggestion: Combine grouping and ranking into single pass. Group first, then sort within groups.

findings.issue: No unit tests for PR creation logic - critical workflow component untested
findings.suggestion: Add tests/unit/test_create_prs.py with mocked gh CLI calls. Test idempotency, branch creation, and error handling.

findings.issue: Edge case not covered: what happens when git repo has no commits?
findings.suggestion: Add test for empty repo scenario. Handle subprocess.CalledProcessError gracefully.

findings.issue: Missing integration test for PAL MCP timeout scenarios
findings.suggestion: Add test with mocked PAL MCP that times out. Verify workflow handles gracefully.
